features.name: Supabase migration — email_sequence_state table
features.description: Create harness/migrations/20260307_email_sequence.sql with email_sequence_state table (id, contact_id ref crm_contacts UNIQUE, email, sequence_step, last_sent_at, next_send_at, status, emails_sent, created_at, updated_at). Index on next_send_at+status. Apply via mcp__supabase__apply_migration.

features.name: Gmail contact loader + sequence initializer
features.description: Query crm_contacts WHERE platform='gmail' AND email IS NOT NULL AND (do_not_do IS NULL OR do_not_do NOT ILIKE '%no email%'). For each not yet in email_sequence_state: INSERT with sequence_step=0, next_send_at=now(), status='active'. Skip existing. Log: 'Initialized N new Gmail contacts into sequence'.

features.name: 3-step email template engine with Claude personalization
features.description: Step 1 (day 0): Subject 'Quick question about your AI automation stack, {first_name}' — ask about pain, share insight, no pitch. Step 2 (day 3): Subject 'How [similar founder] cut 10hrs/week with AI agents' — social proof + soft CTA. Step 3 (day 7): Subject 'Last thing from me — AI Automation Audit (free 30min)' — direct offer. Each uses Claude Haiku to personalize with first_name, headline, bio, what_theyre_building. Body <200 words. Template fallback if Claude fails.

features.name: Gmail sender with graceful degradation
features.description: Check for Gmail API in actp-worker (gmail_client.py or similar). If available: send via API. If not: write to harness/email-outbox/YYYY-MM-DD-{contact_id}.json {to, subject, body, contact_id, step} for manual review. After send: record in crm_message_queue, update email_sequence_state (emails_sent++, sequence_step++, last_sent_at, next_send_at=now()+step_delay), update crm_contacts.last_outbound_at. 30s delay between sends. Stop at EMAIL_DAILY_LIMIT=15.

features.name: Reply detector + sequence stopper
features.description: Check crm_contacts WHERE platform='gmail' AND last_inbound_at>last_outbound_at. On reply: set email_sequence_state.status='replied', stop sequence. Update crm_contacts pipeline_stage='replied', replies_received++. Generate Claude next_action. Send Telegram: '📧 Gmail reply from {name}: "{preview}"'.

features.name: Sequence daemon + launch-email-followup.sh
features.description: Runs every 4h (EMAIL_INTERVAL_HOURS=4). Only 09:00-17:00. CLI: --once, --dry-run (generate, don't send), --status (sequence progress per contact), --init (initialize new contacts only). Log to harness/logs/email-followup-sequence.log. Launch script: start/stop/status/dry-run/send-now/logs. Register in watchdog-queue.sh. Startup Telegram: '📧 Email sequence started — N contacts, N due today'.

features.name: Integration test suite
features.description: Tests: (1) gmail contact count from Supabase matches expected ~110, (2) --init creates email_sequence_state rows for uninitialized contacts, (3) --dry-run generates step 1 email for 3 contacts with non-empty subject+body, (4) daily limit stops at EMAIL_DAILY_LIMIT. Print PASS/FAIL.
